---
title: "Nicolay Vallee"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: assets/profile.jpg
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/nicolay-vallee-81031b137/
    - icon: envelope
      text: E-post
      href: mailto:nicolay@vallee.no
---

M. Sc. Business Analytics

My main interests are economics, quantitative finance, machine learning and econometrics.

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
Looking for roles as analyst, business analyst or financial analyst.
:::
